answers: Best beginner indoor plants: pothos, snake plant, spider plant, ZZ plant, peace lily. All tolerate neglect well.
Low light options: snake plant, ZZ plant, pothos, Chinese evergreen. These survive in offices and dark rooms.
Indoor plant benefits: purify air, reduce stress, boost mood, add humidity, and make your space look beautiful.
Ghor er gach: money plant, snake plant, spider plant — shob kota easy, kam light e hoy, ar air purify kore.
